name_en: Size 23 x 13 x 6 CM Pure overseas channel goods! L&V 2022 new Denim Moon Bag, a limited counter item! The latest LOOP also continues the classic Moon Bag silhouette, replacing the monogram with denim jacquard, full of summer vibes! The key is it really looks good! Everyone knows how popular L&V's classic Moon Bag is, not to mention this limited Denim Moon Bag! It is out of stock on the official website worldwide and basically unavailable at the counter! So buying it is a bonus!
